name: The Warden of Tengmor

sheet.name: The Warden of Tengmor
sheet.background_story:
A quick-nocking archer from the province of Tengmor. 

During the Tournament of the Forsaken Lands Finale, he was perched above the combat pit, ready to neutralize any entity intending to interfere with the event. He witnessed the advent of Goldbeard's Challenge later on. 

Currently, he makes his way to Detriti's Haven to monitor the festivities of the Mystic betrothal.
